name: UFP INDUSTRIES INC
business: UFP Industries, Inc. is a holding company that designs, manufactures, and supplies products made from wood, wood and non-wood composites, and other materials. It operates through three segments: Retail Solutions, Packaging, and Construction. The company serves end markets including retail consumers, industrial packaging users, and residential/commercial construction.
sellsTo: healthcare, hospitality, quick service restaurants, retail, financial institutions

exposures.sentence: Site-Built Construction ... designs and manufactures roof and floor trusses, wall panels, I-joists and lumber packages as well as engineered wood components used to frame residential and light commercial projects.
We've made a variety of investments in automation, allowing us to enhance efficiency and capacity in numerous UFP Construction operations.

Keys to our success in this business unit are low-cost production through expanded automation, including robotics and high efficiency pallet machines, and the procurement of competitively priced industrial grade wood fiber.
Our Retail Solutions segment is focused on distinct product offerings which are grouped by brands and business units.

Site-Built Construction ... designs and manufactures roof and floor trusses, wall panels, I-joists and lumber packages as well as engineered wood components used to frame residential and light commercial projects.

catalysts.event: Capacity consolidations to reduce COGS by $25 million
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we anticipate capacity consolidations completed in 2025 will reduce our cost of goods sold and improve our profitability by $25 million, primarily in our Retail segment.

catalysts.event: Achieve annual new product sales of at least $560 million
catalysts.sentence: Our short-term goal is to achieve annual new product sales of at least $560 million for 2026.

tamClaims.claim: UFP produces approximately 28% of all residential treated wood, 17% of all wood fencing, and 7% of all fire-retardant wood products within the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate we produce approximately 28% of all residential treated wood, 17% of all wood fencing, and 7% of all fire-retardant wood products within the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: UFP manufactures approximately 6-8% of all composite decking and railing in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate we manufacture approximately 6-8% of all composite decking and railing in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: UFP's domestic market share in Structural Packaging is 10-12%.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate our domestic market share in Structural Packaging to be 10-12%.

tamClaims.claim: UFP manufactures approximately 8-10% of new machine-built pallets nationally.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that, as the largest supplier, we manufacture approximately 8-10% of new machine-built pallets nationally.

tamClaims.claim: UFP produces approximately 35% of all roof trusses used in factory-built housing in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate we produce approximately 35% of all roof trusses used in factory-built housing in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: UFP produces approximately 12% of all engineered wood components used in housing in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate we produce approximately 12% of all engineered wood components used in housing in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: UFP purchased approximately 6.4% of the 56 billion board feet of North America softwood lumber production in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: For 2025, we estimate we purchased approximately 6.4% of the 56 billion board feet of North America softwood lumber production.
